extDescription.message: V3 preview of the YouTube activity cleaner for comments and liked videos.

popupLead.message: V3 preview: comments cleanup is ready, and liked videos cleanup is experimental.

popupLookingForBestTab.message: Looking for the best tab to control...

popupOpenCommentsPageToContinue.message: Open the comments page to continue.

popupKeepAwakeAuto.message: Keep-awake will be enabled automatically while cleaning is running.

popupKeepAwakeEnabled.message: Keep-awake is enabled. Chrome should keep the display awake while cleaning runs.

popupSettingsSavedHint.message: Settings are saved locally in Chrome and used on the next run.

popupFastRecommendedNote.message: Fast is recommended. Safe waits longer for Google UI.

popupStopAfterFailuresLabel.message: Stop after failures in a row

popupFootnote.message: Screen sleep prevention helps avoid interruptions, but the active cleaner tab should still stay visible while cleaning is running.

popupPageConnectedOtherTabTarget.message: Connected to a $1 cleaner tab in another tab.

popupPageReadyCurrent.message: Ready on the YouTube comments page.

popupPageConnectedOtherTab.message: Connected to a cleaner tab in another tab.

popupTabUsingCurrent.message: Using the current tab for cleaner commands.

popupPageReadyStartCurrentTab.message: Ready to start on the current tab.

popupTabStartAttachesCurrent.message: Start will attach the cleaner to this tab.

popupTargetComingSoon.message: $1 cleanup is planned, but it is not enabled yet.

popupPageOpenCommentsPrompt.message: Open Google My Activity -> Your YouTube comments.

popupTabNoConnectedCleaner.message: No connected cleaner tab was found right now.

popupPausedHidden.message: Paused because the cleaner tab is not visible.

popupMonitorNeedsVisible.message: You can monitor status here, but the cleaner tab still needs to stay visible.

popupStartAvailableSupportedTab.message: Start is available on the current supported tab.

popupOnlyWorksOnCommentsPage.message: This extension works only on the YouTube comments page.

popupCleanerStartingCurrentPage.message: Cleaner is starting on the current page.

popupCleanerRunningCurrentPage.message: Cleaner is running on the current page.

popupPageStillLoading.message: The comments page is still loading. Wait a moment and try again.

popupReloadCleanerTabReconnect.message: Reload the cleaner tab once so the extension can reconnect to it.

popupReloadCommentsPageConnect.message: Reload the comments page once so the extension can connect to it.

popupCouldNotReadCleanerTabSession.message: Could not read the cleaner tab session.

popupCouldNotRememberCleanerTab.message: Could not remember the cleaner tab.

popupCouldNotClearCleanerTab.message: Could not clear the cleaner tab.

popupReloadCommentsPageTryAgain.message: Reload the comments page and try again.

popupOpenCommentsPageInCurrentTabFirst.message: Open the YouTube comments page in the current tab first.

popupSettingsSavedStarting.message: Settings saved. Starting cleaner with the saved values.

popupNoCleanerTabConnected.message: No cleaner tab is connected right now.

popupUnsavedChanges.message: Unsaved changes. Save them or click Start to use them.

contentPausedBringToFront.message: Paused. Bring this tab to the front to continue.

contentResumedAfterVisible.message: Resumed after the tab became visible.

contentFailedAttempt.message: Failed attempt: $1. Consecutive failures: $2. Total failed: $3

contentStoppedAfterFailures.message: Stopped after $1 failures in a row. Last issue: $2

contentNoMoreDeleteButtons.message: No more visible delete buttons were found.

contentNoMoreLikes.message: No more removable liked videos were found.

contentOpenCommentsPageFirst.message: Open the Your YouTube comments page in Google My Activity first.

contentStartingCleaner.message: Starting $1 cleaner with $2 retries and $3 pacing...

contentCleanerStoppedError.message: Cleaner stopped because of an error: $1

logCouldNotLoadSettings.message: Could not load cleaner settings from storage.

logCleanerStartedFromExtension.message: YouTube Activity Cleaner started from the extension.

logCleanerStoppedBecauseOfError.message: YouTube Activity Cleaner stopped because of an error:
